final:
module top_module(
  input clk,
  input rst,
  input [n-1:0] in,
  output reg [n-1:0] out
);parameter n = 8; // number of bits in the input and output signals

reg [n-1:0] accumulator_value; // register to store the accumulated accumulator_value

always @(posedge clk) begin
  if (rst) begin
    accumulator_value <= 0; // reset the accumulated accumulator_value to zero
  end else begin
    accumulator_value <= accumulator_value + in; // add the input signal to the accumulated accumulator_value
  end
end

assign out = rst ? 0 : accumulator_value; // select between the accumulated accumulator_value and zero based on the reset signal

endmodule
